title: amygdalus × hybrida
intro: Amygdalus × hybrida, also known as apricot kernel, is a plant derived from the seeds of the apricot tree (Prunus armeniaca). The medicinal properties of Amygdalus × hybrida include its potential to act as an antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent, which may contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Amygdalus × hybrida include its potential to support immune function, reduce pain, and promote overall well-being. Amygdalus × hybrida can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support digestive health and reduce inflammation.
